ENABLE_FBR_DESCRIPTION: When enabled, all sales invoices will be submitted to FBR automatically
AUTO_SUBMIT_DESCRIPTION: Automatically submit invoices to FBR in background. If disabled, manual submission required.
FBR_INFO_1: FBR credentials are provided by Federal Board of Revenue after registration
FBR_INFO_2: Always test in Sandbox mode before enabling Production mode
FBR_INFO_3: STRN format must be: 1234567-8 (7 digits, hyphen, 1 digit)
FBR_INFO_4: POS ID and Branch Code must be uppercase alphanumeric characters
FBR_INFO_5: Access tokens are automatically refreshed before expiry
